name: Form: Complete

description.en: Completion screen shown after a successful form submission.
description.fr: Ecran de confirmation apres l envoi reussi du formulaire.
description.es: Pantalla de confirmacion despues del envio exitoso del formulario.
description.ro: Ecran de finalizare dupa trimiterea cu succes a formularului.

bot: Shown after the user submits a form. Personalizes the message with the submitter's name from the URL. The custom_message query param overrides the default message if set — this is populated from the Form smart contract's completeMessage field.

success.en: {{CUSTOM_MESSAGE || 'Thanks {{SUBMITTER_NAME}} — your details are with us. We will reach out shortly.'}}
success.de: {{CUSTOM_MESSAGE || 'Danke {{SUBMITTER_NAME}} — deine Daten sind bei uns. Wir melden uns in Kürze.'}}
success.fr: {{CUSTOM_MESSAGE || 'Merci {{SUBMITTER_NAME}} — nous avons bien recu vos informations. Nous reviendrons vers vous bientot.'}}
success.es: {{CUSTOM_MESSAGE || 'Gracias {{SUBMITTER_NAME}} — tenemos tus datos. Te contactaremos pronto.'}}
success.ro: {{CUSTOM_MESSAGE || 'Multumim {{SUBMITTER_NAME}} — avem datele tale. Vom reveni catre tine in scurt timp.'}}
